options.command: cd {projectRoot} && PRODUCT_VERSION={args.version} poetry run nuitka --onefile gd_sudachi/main.py --onefile-tempdir-spec="{CACHE_DIR}/gd-sdachi/{VERSION}" --product-version=${PRODUCT_VERSION:-1.0} --output-dir=../../dist/target/gd-sudachi/ --output-filename=gd-sudachi-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -f2 -d' ') --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachipy, os; print(os.path.join(sudachipy.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachipy/resources --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachidict_core, os; print(os.path.join(sudachidict_core.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachidict_core/resources

cd {projectRoot} && PRODUCT_VERSION={args.version} poetry run nuitka --onefile gd_sudachi/main.py --onefile-tempdir-spec="{CACHE_DIR}/gd-sdachi/{VERSION}" --product-version=${PRODUCT_VERSION:-1.0} --output-dir=../../dist/target/gd-sudachi/ --output-filename=gd-sudachi-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -f2 -d' ') --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachipy, os; print(os.path.join(sudachipy.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachipy/resources --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c "import sudachidict_core, os; print(os.path.join(sudachidict_core.__path__[0], 'resources'))")=sudachidict_core/resources

cd {projectRoot} && powershell -Command "$env:PRODUCT_VERSION='{args.version}'; if (-not $env:PRODUCT_VERSION) { $env:PRODUCT_VERSION='1.0' }; poetry run nuitka --assume-yes-for-downloads --onefile --onefile-tempdir-spec='{CACHE_DIR}/gd-sdachi/{VERSION}' --product-version=$env:PRODUCT_VERSION gd_sudachi/main.py --output-dir=../../dist/target/gd-sudachi/ --output-filename=gd-sudachi-$(rustc -Vv | Select-String 'host:' | ForEach-Object {$_.Line.split(' ')[1]}) --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c 'import sudachipy, os; print(os.path.join(sudachipy.__path__[0], "resources"))')=sudachipy/resources --include-data-dir=$(poetry run python -c 'import sudachidict_core, os; print(os.path.join(sudachidict_core.__path__[0], "resources"))')=sudachidict_core/resources"
